summary: Iteration 26 - Tested Feedback System (Phase 3), Lab features, and verified new UI components. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/feedback/tool - saves positive feedback
Backend: POST /api/feedback/tool - saves neutral feedback
Backend: POST /api/feedback/tool - saves negative feedback
Backend: POST /api/feedback/tool - rejects invalid reaction (400)
Backend: POST /api/feedback/codesign - saves co-design waitlist entry
Backend: GET /api/feedback/summary - returns 403 for non-admin
Backend: POST /api/lab - saves suggestion
Backend: POST /api/lab - saves problem report
Backend: POST /api/lab - rejects invalid submission type (400)
Backend: GET /api/lab/votes - returns vote counts and user's votes
Backend: POST /api/lab/vote - records vote on idea
Backend: POST /api/lab/vote - rejects duplicate vote (400)
Backend: POST /api/lab/vote - rejects missing ideaId (400)
Backend: POST /api/humanise - endpoint exists
Backend: POST /api/history/save - endpoint works for autosave
Frontend: Dashboard shows Lab sidebar card with Suggest/Vote/Report buttons
Frontend: Lab suggest modal opens and accepts input
Frontend: Lab report modal opens with tool selector
Frontend: /lab page loads with 4 voteable ideas
Frontend: Vote buttons display vote counts
Frontend: Humaniser page loads with accuracy notice
Frontend: Humaniser has text input and submit button
Frontend: Course Planner upload zone renders correctly
Frontend: /feedback-dashboard redirects non-admin to /dashboard
Frontend: FeedbackWidget imported in 9 tool output pages (ResultsPremium for Brief Simplifier)
critical_code_review_comments: FeedbackWidget correctly uses 8-second delay via setTimeout in useEffect
Lab voting system properly prevents duplicate votes with 'Already voted' error
Feedback summary endpoint correctly restricts access to admin (aaronbugge@gmail.com)
Autosave utility saves to both localStorage and server with toast notifications
RecoveryBanner checks for recent (<24h) localStorage entries before displaying
seed_data_creation: Created test feedback entries, co-design waitlist entry, lab suggestions, and votes during testing

mocked_apis.note: Stripe payments use TESTING_MODE. All other endpoints are real.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 complete. Phase 3 Feedback System fully tested: (1) POST /api/feedback/tool saves feedback with reaction, followUpAnswer, openText - all 3 reaction types tested. (2) POST /api/feedback/codesign saves waitlist entries. (3) GET /api/feedback/summary returns 403 for non-admin (admin-only endpoint for aaronbugge@gmail.com). (4) Lab endpoints: POST /api/lab saves suggestions/problems, GET /api/lab/votes returns vote counts, POST /api/lab/vote records votes with duplicate prevention. (5) Frontend: Dashboard has Lab sidebar card with Suggest/Vote/Report buttons, modals work correctly, /lab page shows 4 voteable ideas. (6) FeedbackWidget is integrated in all 9 tool output pages with 8-second delay. (7) Humaniser page has accuracy notice and AI risk score badges in output (data-testid='ai-risk-scores'). (8) Course Planner has date confirmation phase (data-testid='planner-date-confirm'). (9) Autosave saves to localStorage + server with toast. (10) RecoveryBanner shows for recent outputs. Test user: test@simplifii.com / test123. Admin: aaronbugge@gmail.com (Google OAuth only - cannot test admin dashboard via password login).

feedback_system.codesign_waitlist: Working - saves name, email, university, toolIdea
feedback_system.admin_summary: Working - returns 403 for non-admin, admin-only access
feedback_system.feedback_widget_ui: Integrated in all 9 tool output pages with 8-second delay

lab_system.get_votes: Working - returns all 4 idea vote counts

humaniser_ai_risk.ui_badges: data-testid='ai-risk-scores' present in Humaniser.js output section
humaniser_ai_risk.api_response: originalAiRisk and humanisedAiRisk integers expected in response

autosave.toast: Working - shows 'Saved to your history' or 'Saved locally'
